items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the system can revert to the default pack if needed. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations that confirm this functionality was tested or validated. The linked use case mentions the need for reverting to the default pack, but there is no direct evidence showing that this requirement was addressed during the saga run.
